data.name: Wish
data.detailed_description:
推出新 DLC

大家好 我係同大家一齐嘅Wish
Steam 2020最後一次銷售不容錯過！





新嘅故仔情節終於喺DLC中發佈。
使用Wish - Beyond Fate DLC享受獨特嘅體驗！


📌look at this Games📌




📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌



關於此遊戲

關於"WISH"

特別感謝
修改中文翻譯
-Miguo
修改中文商店翻譯
-修羅修羅


.
這裡是伊斯拉菲大陸（Israfil Continent），一個劍與魔法的世界。我們的主人公索馬·達基翁（Soma Dakeyon）在這里長大，並一直享受著他的和平日常。
直到在他成年的那天，他收到了最惡的暴君、瘋狂的皇帝Diadora Level的命令，進入了她的后宮。

.
不得已，索馬（Soma）在命運的驅使下，開始了拯救大陸的旅程，此時的伊斯拉菲爾大陸正在因畏懼邪惡的女皇而戰栗……
精靈龐帝菲克斯，公主騎士，吸血鬼始祖等。在眾多美少女等待的戰場上，
你能想像出索瑪將會展開什麼樣的冒險嗎？

遊戲的特點

.
“WISH”“夙愿”是一款三消游戏，您可以通过消除珠宝并进行连击来攻击敌人；同时结合了“视觉小说”元素。

.
每个少女都有独属于她的故事，随着故事的展开，您需要与她们战斗，并让她们成为您的合作者，以便最终与最终的邪恶女帝战斗。培养您的技能，
属性和能力，以便您可以充分享受在伊斯拉菲大陆的冒险。
培养你的技能，属性和能力，充分享受在伊斯拉菲尔的冒险经历吧。

data.short_description: 索瑪人在命運的驅使下，開始尋求拯救自己的家-伊斯拉菲爾大陸（Israfil Continent）的住所。伊斯拉菲爾大陸因害怕邪惡的女皇而顫抖…… 精靈龐帝菲克斯，公主騎士，第一個吸血鬼等，許多美女等待著他們的故事揭開面紗， 這次冒險結束後會發生什麼...？
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.12 or Later
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card

data.name: Wish
data.detailed_description:
New DLC Available

Hi, I'm Wish with you.
Don't miss the last steam 2020 date!





A new story has finally been released in DLC.
Wish - Enjoy a unique experience with Beyond Family DLC!


📌look at this Games📌




📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌



About the Game

Free DLC has been released.
Please check the DLC store.

Special thanks for
modifying Chinese translation
-Miguo
modifying Chinese store translation
-脩羅脩羅
modifying English translation
-Laggy Dealer
-Definitely Not Stalin


About "WISH"

.
The continent of Israfil, in a world of sword and sorcery, is where our protagonist, Soma Dakeyon, has grown up, enjoying his peaceful affairs.
Then on the day he became an adult, he received an order from the nefarious tyrant and mad emperor Diadora Level to join her harem.

.
However, Soma, who is driven by the current of destiny, sets out on a journey to save the continent which trembles in fear of the empress…
Elf Pontifex, princess knight, the original vampire, amongst others will join him on his quest. At the battlefield where so many beauties are awaiting,
imagine what kind of adventures will unfold……..?!

Characteristic of Game

.
‘Wish’ is a match three game where you attack your enemy by eliminating jewels and making combos paired with a visual novel element.

Each woman has a story in which you will need to fight against them and make them your companions in order to ultimately fight against the unfathomable wickedness. Develop your skill, item and capability so that you can abundantly enjoy the adventure in the continent of Israfil.

■ Voice CAST
ERICA：相模恋（Sagami Ren)
NATRIA：森乃なんな（Morino Nanna)
TEIA：歩サラ（Ayumi Sara）
VERCHINO：花宮楓（Hanamiya Kaede）
ABIGAIL：潮谷篭愛（Shiotani Kagome）
POPOTINO：明里芽依（Akesato Mei）
REMRIEL：南雲梨沙（Nagumo Risa)
DIADORA：椿なつめ（Tsubaki Natsume）

■Japanese Voice Produce step
Sound Director：なかせひな（Nakase Hina）
Engineer：ひろし（Hiroshi）
2nd Translation Writer：ふぉあぐら系男子（Foagurakei danshi）
Produce Step：大野まりな（Ohno Marina）
　　　　　　　高嶺翔（Takamine Sho）
Sound Creation Company：株式会社HoneyBomb（HoneyBomb Co., Ltd.）

PM：えろフェッショナルΩ(Erofessional OMEGA)
PRODUCER：悪眼極(Akume Kimeru)
プロデュース会社：MIZUWARI

A Special Thanks to
HoneyBomb（HoneyBomb Co., Ltd.）
MIZUWARI

data.short_description: Soma, driven by destiny, begins his quest to save his home, Israfil Continent, which trembles in fear of an evil empress… Elf Pontifex, princess knight, the first vampire, etc , with the many beautiful women waiting for their stories to unravel, what will happen in the end of this adventure...?

English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
